name: Project Sync / Status Update
description: Weekly or bi-weekly project status meeting focusing on milestones and risks.

sections.title: Meeting Date & Time
sections.instruction: Extract the meeting date, start/end time, and facilitator name only if explicitly stated in the transcript; otherwise leave blank.

sections.title: Attendees
sections.instruction: List each attendee named in the transcript along with their role, only if the role was stated.

sections.title: Milestones & Status
sections.instruction: List each project milestone discussed, with its current status and estimated completion date, using only what was stated.

sections.title: Progress Summary
sections.instruction: Write a short paragraph summarizing progress made since the last sync, based only on what was discussed.

sections.title: Top Risks & Mitigations
sections.instruction: List the top risks raised, with impact level, mitigation plan, and owner, only where each was actually stated; otherwise leave the cell blank.

sections.title: Key Decisions
sections.instruction: List the decisions made in this meeting with their rationale if stated. In the Ref column, cite the moment the decision was made as @ref(MM:SS) — for example @ref(01:05) — whenever that moment is identifiable in the transcript; otherwise leave the cell blank.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List assigned tasks with owner, due date, priority, and status. Only include a field if it was actually stated; otherwise leave the cell blank (do not write 'None'). In the Ref column, cite the moment the task was assigned as @ref(MM:SS) — for example @ref(01:05) — whenever clearly identifiable; otherwise leave blank.

sections.title: Related Documents
sections.instruction: List any documents, tickets, or designs referenced by name or link in the transcript, with their type (e.g. doc, ticket, design). Only include documents actually mentioned.
